title: Standard Operating Procedure for HCP Product Monograph Development

explainability.purpose: Governs the generation of Summaries of Product Characteristics (SmPCs) and prescribing guidance.
explainability.limitations: Strictly limited to indications approved by the FDA/EMA.
explainability.governanceControls: Double-signature lock validation, and compliance audits.

steps.instruction: Formulate clinical pharmacology section based on pharmacokinetic data.
Insert drug-drug interactions and adverse reaction warnings.
Obtain regulatory sign-off and electronic signature registration.

content:
# SOP-REG-001: Product Monograph Writing
## 1. Purpose
Governs development of Summaries of Product Characteristics.
## 2. Procedure
1. Write pharmacology. 2. Define indications. 3. Include drug interactions. 4. Register sign-offs.
